creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

it looks like assp vendors finally decided to go back to their 1.8.5.5 
original archive and to include recent changes in a new 1.8.5.6 
version.
Could you please confirm this and if possible submit a follow-up to 
this PR for the new 1.8.5.6 release?

Thanks,
culot@
